title: Gemini Logo Animation
description: A premium web-based recreation of the Gemini generative identity. This project showcases fluid motion design, advanced SVG/CSS filtering, and adaptive performance rendering.

title: Ada Technical Institute
description: A corporate learning and assessment platform for a technical institute, focusing on user experience and performance.

title: Nextgen CFO
description: A modern CFO website, built with React and a modern UI library to provide key insights.

title: SkyGlow Construction
description: A professional website for a construction company, showcasing their portfolio and services.

title: Logi Transport Hub
description: A logistics and transportation management system for tracking shipments and managing fleets.

title: Feedback Hub 360
description: A comprehensive feedback management system built with React, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM for organizational feedback collection and analysis.

title: Sales & Inventory Management
description: An offline-capable inventory system built with Python and Tkinter. Features product management, sales processing with real-time stock validation, PDF invoice generation, and debt tracking.

title: JAKE Retro Download Manager
description: A desktop application built with Python for managing and accelerating file downloads with a retro UI.
